DSTD.Settings.ApplyPermission.Name: Apply Damage/Status Condition Permission
DSTD.Settings.ApplyPermission.Hint: Minimum user role allowed to apply or undo target-aware damage and status buttons. Non-Director users can only use buttons from messages whose source actor or token they own.
DSTD.Settings.HideSystemButtons.Name: Hide System Roll & Damage Buttons
DSTD.Settings.HideSystemButtons.Hint: When enabled, hides the Draw Steel system's built-in chat damage/effect buttons and roll details so only the per-target panel from this module is shown.
DSTD.Settings.AoeTargeting.Name: AOE Targeting
DSTD.Settings.AoeTargeting.Hint: When enabled, Draw Steel ability regions automatically target tokens in the placed area using the ability target type and token dispositions.
DSTD.Settings.OverrideAbilityRegionVisib: When enabled, Draw Steel ability template regions are created with Always for Anyone visibility instead of Always for Observers.
DSTD.Settings.MinionDamageAutomation.Hin: When enabled, target damage handles squad stamina damage caps and automatically marks minions defeated as the squad pool crosses death thresholds.
DSTD.Settings.TargetImageSource.Name: Target Image Source
DSTD.Settings.TargetImageSource.Hint: Choose whether target boxes show token artwork or actor portraits.
DSTD.Chat.NoActions: No damage or status effects for this result.
DSTD.Chat.NoRollForTarget: No roll recorded for this target.
DSTD.Dialog.EditRoll.Title: Edit Roll for {name}
DSTD.Dialog.EditRoll.Hint: Power roll dice: {natural}. Adjusting edges, banes, bonuses, or penalties may change the tier result for this target.
DSTD.Dialog.EditDamage.Title: Edit Damage for {name}
DSTD.Dialog.EditDamage.AdditionalHint: A formula or fixed bonus to add (e.g. 1d3 or 3).
DSTD.Notify.NoPermission: You do not have permission to use that target control.
DSTD.Notify.NoSelectedToken: Select a token before using the base target controls.
DSTD.Notify.NoGM: No active Director is available to process that request.
DSTD.Notify.SocketTimeout: The Director did not respond to the target damage request.
DSTD.Notify.MinionPickPrompt: Select {count} minion(s) to mark as dead in {name}. Press Escape to cancel.
DSTD.Notify.NoSurgeActor: No hero or retainer mentor was found to spend surges from.
DSTD.Notify.NotEnoughSurges: That actor does not have enough surges.
DSTD.Notify.SurgesSingleTarget: Surges can only be spent on one target at a time.
